description: A flight time in a passenger's itinerary has been changed by the airline. The agent needs to send the updated itinerary.

nodes.task_description: Identify the booking affected by the schedule change from a system alert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the booking that needs to be updated.

nodes.task_description: Verify the passenger has accepted the schedule change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the passenger has acknowledged and accepted the new flight time.

nodes.task_description: Generate and email the new, updated itinerary to the passenger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the updated travel documents.
